message:
Add parent changelog entry for ship plugin rename

Document the breaking change in the parent project's changelog to notify
users that the changelog plugin has been renamed to ship. Also update the
managing-plugins skill documentation to remove the outdated reference to
tenzir-changelog.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -18,7 +18,7 @@ Every plugin lives in `plugins/<plugin-name>/` with this structure:
 plugins/<plugin-name>/
 ├── .claude-plugin/
 │   └── plugin.json    # Plugin metadata and configuration
-├── changelog/         # Plugin changelog (managed by tenzir-changelog)
+├── changelog/         # Plugin changelog
 ├── README.md          # User-facing documentation (required)
 ├── skills/            # See [skills.md](./skills.md)
 ├── commands/          # See [commands.md](./commands.md)

@@ -0,0 +1,10 @@
+---
+title: Changelog plugin renamed to ship
+type: breaking
+authors:
+  - mavam
+  - claude
+created: 2026-01-09T17:28:48.058723Z
+---
+
+The `changelog` plugin has been renamed to `ship` to better reflect its broader focus on release engineering. Users who have installed the `changelog` plugin should update their configuration to use `ship` instead.
